intent: Identify duplicate-backed source folders that can enter an archive-review plan without moving or deleting assets.
required_next_gate: Human selects a candidate family for an archive move plan.
Verifier reruns this report and confirms full_duplicate_coverage and full_zip_coverage still hold.
Receipt names source path, archive destination, report hash, file count, and rollback path.
Move operation happens in a separate explicit lane; this report never deletes files.
